log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Githzerai — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Githzerai — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Githzerai — Armored Escapist.
→ Githzerai — Armored Escapist: CON save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 20] FAIL! 33 necrotic damage. HP: 26/59
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Githzerai — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:5+9=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Githzerai — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Githzerai — Armored Escapist.
→ Githzerai — Armored Escapist healed for 6 HP. HP: 32/59
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Githzerai — Armored Escapist: FAIL! 29 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Githzerai — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Githzerai — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Githzerai — Armored Escapist: SUCCESS. 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
